SessionStart.command: bash -c 'echo "── Environment Check ──"; echo "cwd: $(pwd)"; if [ -d .venv ]; then echo "venv: ✅ .venv found"; else echo "venv: ⚠️ .venv not found — run: python -m venv .venv && pip install -e .[dev]"; fi; if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "node: ✅ $(node --version)"; else echo "node: ⚠️ not on PATH"; fi; if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "npm: ✅ $(npm --version)"; else echo "npm: ⚠️ not on PATH"; fi; echo "──────────────────────"; exit 0'

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && ruff check --fix -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff format -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.env ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.env.* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files directly. Use environment variables or a secret manager."; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
